creator: thierry@thomas.as
text:
Le 29 Déc 01 à 23:35:44 +0000, Thierry Thomas écrivait :
> 
> >Number:         33312
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       New port: www/jonah - a portal and content collection system

If PR ports/35051 (recopy of www/horde-devel to www/horde2) is
committed, please apply the following patch:


diff -ur /usr/ports/www/jonah.orig/Makefile /usr/ports/www/jonah/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/jonah.orig/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 22:44:52 2002
+++ /usr/ports/www/jonah/Makefile	Sun Feb 17 17:29:16 2002
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 
 MAINTAINER=	thierry@pompo.net
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/www/horde/index.php:${PORTSDIR}/www/horde-devel \
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/www/horde/index.php:${PORTSDIR}/www/horde2 \
 		${LOCALBASE}/bin/php:${PORTSDIR}/lang/php4
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
diff -ur /usr/ports/www/jonah.orig/pkg-message /usr/ports/www/jonah/pkg-message
--- /usr/ports/www/jonah.orig/pkg-message	Thu Dec 27 18:13:41 2001
+++ /usr/ports/www/jonah/pkg-message	Sun Feb 17 17:29:50 2002
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 configuration files.
 
 Horde must be configured; if not, see:
-- %%PORTSDIR%%/www/horde-devel/pkg-message
+- %%PORTSDIR%%/www/horde2/pkg-message
 
 Then, you may have to tune the configuration files located in
 %%CONFDIR%%/, specially the files conf.php.



-- 
Th. Thomas.
